CustomField.description: Controls whether the first installment Opportunity for a new Recurring Donation is created synchronously (in the same transaction) or asynchronously (via Queueable). Options: "Synchronous" (default), "Asynchronous" (always async), "Asynchronous_When_Bulk" (async only for bulk operations). Use async modes to avoid governor limits when creating many Recurring Donations at once.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How the first installment Opportunity is created: Synchronous (default), Asynchronous, or Asynchronous When Bulk. Use async for bulk operations.
CustomField.label: Installment Opportunity Async Behavior
